ogTitle: Kancoona vs Kangaroo Ground: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kancoona and Kangaroo Ground.
heading: Kancoona vs Kangaroo Ground — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kancoona, Victoria and Kangaroo Ground, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kancoona has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kangaroo Ground (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kancoona or Kangaroo Ground safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kancoona has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Kangaroo Ground scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kancoona scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroo Ground scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kancoona or Kangaroo Ground?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kancoona has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
